title_en: 2. The prophets used to tell their nations that victory will be theirs: 3. All the divinely revealed legislations which they conveyed and the past
content_en:
and utter decline will be the fate of their foes. What they assuredly foretold always came true. Such was the case of NUb. (Noah), Hud, Salih, Shu'ayb, Ibrahim (Abraham), Lut (Lot), Musa (Moses) and our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon them all). All their stories have been mentioned in the Qur';1n.

stories they narrated are ultimately accurate and perfect. They reveal the truth and lead people to absolute guidance. Such things may only emanate from the most knowledgeable and righteous persons. 4. Allah persistently supports their cause, since it is known that Allah never stands up for imposters or liars. Allah always disgraces liars and finally leads them to perish.
content_id:
Para nabi menyampaikan kepada umat mereka bahwa kemenangan akan menjadi milik mereka dan kehancuran total akan menjadi nasib musuh-musuh mereka. Apa yang mereka janjikan dengan pasti selalu terbukti. Demikianlah yang terjadi pada Nuh, Hud, Shalih, Syuayb, Ibrahim (as), Lut, Musa (as), dan Nabi kita Muhammad ﷺ.

Berikan tanda centang untuk jawaban benar:
1. Semua nabi dan rasul diutus dengan membawa ajaran tauhid. ( )
2. Nabi Isa (as) mengajarkan umatnya untuk menyembah Trinitas. ( )
3. Para nabi saling membenarkan satu sama lain. ( )
title_id: Para Nabi Memberitahu Umatnya tentang Kemenangan
